hookUsed: From 5 hours to 30 minutes per email

script.words: From 5 hours to 30 minutes per email
script.visual: animated clock ticking from 5 hours to 30 minutes

script.words: Imagine you're a sales team, sending out emails one by one, taking 5 hours to send just 10 emails.
script.visual: team working on computers, with a clock in the corner

script.words: But what if you could automate that process and send 10 emails in just 30 minutes?
Real example: increased email open rates by 25% in just 1 week.
The key to success is not just automation, but also personalization and relevance.
Comment below with X to get the template and start sending 30-minute emails!

ctaStrategy.exactWords: Comment below with X to get the template and start sending 30-minute emails!

recordingNotes: Show enthusiasm and energy while recording. Use a mix of close-ups and wide shots to keep the viewer engaged.
